name: a6-backfill
description: A6 splat-cache backfill MVP (PFP Stage 3) — hybrid scene with splatCache ON must drain dirty cells from the GPU (drainCount > 0 via getRenderLoopState().a6SplatCache). The poll command supplies its own render demand (forceMarkDirty per iteration, C2 convention) and throws loudly on timeout. The settled checkpoint is capture-only: A6 must not change visuals (hybrid-default owns the pixel-diff guard for this scene) and backfill replan timing varies.

commands: (() => { window.__canarySetDisplayState({ features: { splatCache: 'on' } }); var s = window.__canaryGetRenderLoopState(); return 'A6 splatCache ON; a6=' + JSON.stringify(s && s.a6SplatCache); })()

new Promise(function(resolve, reject){ var t0 = Date.now(); (function poll(){ try { if (window.__canaryForceMarkDirty) window.__canaryForceMarkDirty('a6-drain-poll'); var s = window.__canaryGetRenderLoopState && window.__canaryGetRenderLoopState(); var a6 = s && s.a6SplatCache; if (a6 && a6.stats && a6.stats.drainCount > 0) { resolve('A6 drains observed: ' + JSON.stringify(a6) + ' atlasFrames=' + (s && s.atlasFramesCount)); return; } if (Date.now() - t0 > 60000) { reject(new Error('A6 drain never fired within 60s; a6=' + JSON.stringify(a6) + ' atlasFrames=' + (s && s.atlasFramesCount) + ' fingerprint=' + JSON.stringify(s && s.atlasFingerprint))); return; } setTimeout(poll, 100); } catch (e) { reject(e instanceof Error ? e : new Error(String(e))); } })(); })
